---
title: "Ravel"
title-meta: "Ravel: Language Server, Formatter, and Linter for R"
description-meta: >-
  Ravel is a language server, formatter, and linter for R.
title-prefix: ""
image: images/logo.svg
image-alt: "Ravel logo"

open-graph:
  title: "Ravel: Language Server, Formatter, and Linter for R"

twitter-card:
  title: "Ravel: Language Server, Formatter, and Linter for R"

format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<!-- <img src="images/logo.svg" alt="Ravel logo" class="float-end ms-3" -->
<!-- style="max-width: 20%; height: auto;"> -->

Ravel is a language server, formatter, and linter for R.

<div style="clear: both;"></div>

## Quick Start

Install with Cargo:

```bash
cargo install ravel
```

Format your first document:

```bash
ravel format file.R
```

Run lint checks:

```bash
ravel lint file.R
```

For full installation options (prebuilt binaries, package managers, and source
builds), see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Where to Go Next

- [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd): complete installation and first-run
  walkthrough.
